query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime urban street scene viewed from beneath a leafy tree canopy. Several streetlamps illuminate the pavement and sidewalk, where a green trash bin and low metal fence line the curb. Commercial buildings with illuminated signage recede into the background along the road, and a dark silhouette occupies the right portion of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime urban street scene beneath an illuminated tree canopy, captured with amateur snapshot energy and a tilted, unconventional framing. A dark silhouette in the right foreground creates an obstructed crop, while motion-smeared vehicles and lights in the lower portion render surfaces with badly resolved detail. Mixed streetlight color temperatures produce uneven white balance across the scene.
